sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15381" key="a)rourei/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρουρ-είτης</orth> (or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρουρ-ίτης</orth>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n15381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μῦς ἀ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:108:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">108.27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
